title: AGENTS.md: add structured Persona section for AI assistants
body:
Replace the generic introductory paragraph with a detailed Persona section that gives AI coding assistants explicit guidance on audience assumptions, product mental model, upstream scope boundaries, quality bar, and community expectations when helping Podman contributors.

Signed-off-by: Jhon Honce <jhonce@redhat.com>
Assisted-by: Cursor:claude-opus-4-6
